implementation.verification_output: npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.node.json — 0 new errors. Only 3 pre-existing errors in tipc.ts (lines 182-185, unrelated RevisaoIA type issue).

improvements_made: Dynamic parameterized query building with paramIndex counter — secao_slug, categoria, and limite all use positional $N params, never string interpolation for values
Context string computed for both empty and non-empty results — describes filter applied (secao, categoria, or geral)
Query uses JOIN produto_imagens pi ON is_default = true to only suggest products WITH a default image
LEFT JOIN jornal_itens ji2 counts historical usage across all past journals for frequency ordering
NOT IN subquery excludes products already in current draft journal

improvements_made: analisar_mix: 4 parallel queries (distribuicao, secoes, sem_imagem, duplicados) — could be Promise.all but kept sequential for readability and PGlite single-connection safety
analisar_mix: ocupacao_pct computed per section (ocupados/capacidade * 100) — zero-safe division
analisar_mix: alertas count includes empty sections + sem_imagem + duplicados for summary
comparar_jornais: Set-based comparison in JS (idsA, idsB, mapA) — efficient for large product lists
comparar_jornais: mudancas_preco only compares preco_oferta (most relevant field for promotions)
comparar_jornais: validates both journals exist before proceeding — returns descriptive error with missing IDs

improvements_made: diagnosticar_jornal: Alerts categorized as critical (precos zerados, fallback items), warning (empty/low-occupancy sections, no image), info (general stats, import stats)
diagnosticar_jornal: Import stats included when available — gracefully skips if no importacao exists for the journal
diagnosticar_jornal: Low occupancy threshold at 50% — matches common editorial expectation
exportar_relatorio: Groups items by section using Map — preserves insertion order for sorted output
exportar_relatorio: Totals computed for com_imagem, sem_imagem, fallbacks — quick overview
